concerns.text: FR-001 (global batch generation) and SC-001 (sufficient volume) require a mechanism to aggregate per-topology batches into a global batch. Task T018a ('Implement batch aggregation script') is marked incomplete [ ]. Without this task, the global batch manifest required by T028 (Simulation Runner) cannot be generated, leaving FR-001 and SC-001 unimplementable.

FR-002 (Ising simulator) and SC-002 (runtime constraint) require a runner script to execute simulations on the generated graphs. Task T028 ('Create simulation runner script') is marked incomplete [ ]. It depends on T018a (which is also incomplete). Without T028, the core simulation logic (T024-T027) cannot be executed against the dataset, leaving FR-002 and SC-002 unimplementable.

FR-008 (sensitivity analysis) and SC-005 (≥5 cutoffs) require a sensitivity sweep implementation. Task T035 ('Implement sensitivity sweep') is marked incomplete [ ]. Without this, the analysis pipeline cannot satisfy the mandatory sensitivity analysis requirement, leaving FR-008 and SC-005 unimplementable.

FR-005 (regression/ANOVA) and US-3 (correlate metrics) require a master analysis script to orchestrate the pipeline. Task T037 ('Create master analysis script') is marked incomplete [ ]. It depends on T035 (incomplete) and T029 (simulation results). Without T037, the statistical analysis cannot be run end-to-end, leaving FR-005 and US-3 unimplementable.

SC-003 (Statistical power) requires a power analysis to validate the sample size against the effect size target. Task T044 ('Implement statistical power analysis') is marked incomplete [ ]. Without this task, the project cannot verify if the generated data volume meets the statistical power requirements defined in SC-003, leaving the success criterion unmeasurable.

SC-001, SC-002, and SC-005 require explicit validation of volume, runtime, and sensitivity cutoffs. Task T045 ('Run full batch validation script') is marked incomplete [ ]. Without this validation step, the success criteria cannot be formally verified against the generated artifacts, leaving the project unable to confirm compliance with SC-001, SC-002, and SC-005.

US-2 (Independent Test) requires a unit test for spin-flip logic to assert energy conservation and Boltzmann factor matching. Task T021 ('Unit test for spin-flip logic') is marked incomplete [ ]. While tests are optional per the header, the spec's 'Independent Test' for US-2 explicitly requires verifying these physics constraints. Omitting this test leaves the core physics implementation unverified against the spec's acceptance criteria.

Task T047 ('Verify config.yaml documentation and reproducibility') is marked incomplete [ ]. While config.yaml creation (T004) is complete, the verification task is missing. This is a writing/traceability gap where the plan element (Constitution Principle I) is not explicitly covered by a completed verification task, though the artifact exists.
